problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
